# Log Explorer

Store and explore your logs in the Cloudflare dashboard or API

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/log-explorer/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Log Explorer](https://developers.cloudflare.com/log-explorer/index.md): Store and explore Cloudflare logs in the dashboard.

## Log Search

- [Log Search](https://developers.cloudflare.com/log-explorer/log-search/index.md): Search and explore stored logs via dashboard or API.

## SQL queries supported

- [SQL queries supported](https://developers.cloudflare.com/log-explorer/sql-queries/index.md): Review SQL syntax supported by Log Explorer.

## Example SQL queries

- [Example SQL queries](https://developers.cloudflare.com/log-explorer/example-queries/index.md): SQL queries for traffic, security, and performance analysis.

## Manage datasets

- [Manage datasets](https://developers.cloudflare.com/log-explorer/manage-datasets/index.md): Enable or disable Log Explorer datasets.

## Log Explorer API

- [Log Explorer API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/log-explorer/api/index.md): Query and configure Log Explorer via the API.

## Pricing and managing usage

- [Pricing and managing usage](https://developers.cloudflare.com/log-explorer/pricing/index.md): Understand Log Explorer billing and usage.

## FAQ

- [FAQ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/log-explorer/faq/index.md): Find answers to common questions about Log Explorer.

## Changelog

- [Changelog](https://developers.cloudflare.com/log-explorer/changelog/index.md): View recent changes to Cloudflare Logs.
